description: The main objective of this pipeline is to get a project user directory and list its contents. The steps are getting the project user directory, listing all files within it, and annotating the file paths.

eb872e43-2214-4902-b9a2-e540a3f3703e.name: path-to-annotation-simple
eb872e43-2214-4902-b9a2-e540a3f3703e.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.

f9ad6726-a0ed-4982-852a-afb6e1af06cb.name: path-to-annotation-simple
f9ad6726-a0ed-4982-852a-afb6e1af06cb.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.

afbae2e1-e93a-4b6c-96ff-d0acf23c7d32.name: folder-list-files
afbae2e1-e93a-4b6c-96ff-d0acf23c7d32.description: Lists all files in the input folder

b29ca8db-f927-4a21-9513-870df90db8a7.name: project-user-directory
b29ca8db-f927-4a21-9513-870df90db8a7.description: Returns a project user (Project > Project settings > User directories) folder as data

89849824-53a6-437f-ab06-9ef6aa51f091.name: path-to-annotation-simple
89849824-53a6-437f-ab06-9ef6aa51f091.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.
